mapper.update: update user_order_event_outbox set status = 'PUBLISHED', published_time = #{publishedTime}, last_error = null, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED')

update user_order_event_outbox set status = 'FAILED', attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, last_error = #{lastError}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED')
mapper.sql: id, event_id as eventId, message_id as messageId, exchange_name as exchangeName, routing_key as routingKey, payload_json as payloadJson, status, attempt_count as attemptCount, next_retry_time as nextRetryTime, last_error as lastError, published_time as publishedTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime
